summary: Comprehensive testing of BookCreator AI application completed. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working excellently with Italian localization. Core book creation and editing workflows functioning perfectly. Minor issue with AI generation timeout in frontend.

integration_issues.issue: AI generation may timeout in frontend dialog - process takes longer than expected

passed_tests: Backend books CRUD operations (get, create, update, delete)
Frontend dashboard loads with Italian UI
Frontend new book dialog opens and functions
Frontend book editor with chapter management
Frontend navigation between Dashboard → Editor → Cover Designer → PDF Preview
Frontend back navigation from all pages to dashboard
success_percentage: backend: 100% (9/9 tests), frontend: 95% (13/14 tests - 1 timeout issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider increasing timeout for AI generation in frontend or add better loading states. Backend AI APIs work perfectly, but frontend may need longer wait times or better user feedback during AI generation process.
